headline: Designed collaboratively, produced with studio precision.
description: A practical and transparent flow from idea to delivery.

steps.title: Discovery Brief
steps.description: We align on use case, dimensions, finish direction, and timeline.

steps.title: Prototype + Glaze Tests
steps.description: We share sample forms and finish studies for approval.

steps.title: Production + Delivery
steps.description: Approved designs move into batch production, firing, and final hand-finish.
